conditions.name: Viral Fever
conditions.description: A common viral infection causing elevated body temperature and general discomfort.

conditions.name: Bacterial Infection
conditions.description: An infection caused by bacteria that may affect various body parts.

conditions.name: Common Cold
conditions.description: A mild viral respiratory infection affecting the nose and throat.

conditions.name: Influenza (Flu)
conditions.description: A contagious respiratory illness caused by influenza viruses.

conditions.name: Migraine
conditions.description: A neurological condition causing severe, recurring headaches often with nausea.

conditions.name: Tension Headache
conditions.description: The most common type of headache caused by stress or muscle tension.

conditions.name: Sinusitis
conditions.description: Inflammation of the sinuses, often due to infection or allergy.

conditions.name: Allergic Rhinitis
conditions.description: An allergic response causing cold-like symptoms triggered by allergens.

conditions.name: Bronchitis
conditions.description: Inflammation of the bronchial tubes causing cough and mucus production.

conditions.name: Asthma
conditions.description: A chronic respiratory condition causing airway narrowing and breathing difficulty.

conditions.name: Pneumonia
conditions.description: An infection that inflames the air sacs in one or both lungs.

conditions.name: Hypertension
conditions.description: Persistently high blood pressure that increases the risk of heart disease.

conditions.name: Hypotension
conditions.description: Abnormally low blood pressure causing dizziness and fainting.

conditions.name: Gastroenteritis
conditions.description: Inflammation of the stomach and intestines, typically caused by infection.

conditions.name: Acid Reflux / GERD
conditions.description: A condition where stomach acid frequently flows back into the esophagus.

conditions.name: Irritable Bowel Syndrome
conditions.description: A chronic gastrointestinal disorder affecting the large intestine.

conditions.name: Urinary Tract Infection
conditions.description: An infection in any part of the urinary system caused by bacteria.

conditions.name: Kidney Stones
conditions.description: Hard deposits of minerals and salts that form inside the kidneys.

conditions.name: Conjunctivitis (Pink Eye)
conditions.description: Inflammation or infection of the transparent membrane lining the eyelid.

conditions.name: Otitis Media (Ear Infection)
conditions.description: An infection of the middle ear, most common in children.

conditions.name: Type 2 Diabetes
conditions.description: A chronic metabolic condition where blood sugar levels remain too high.

conditions.name: Hypothyroidism
conditions.description: A condition where the thyroid gland doesn't produce enough thyroid hormone.

conditions.name: Hyperthyroidism
conditions.description: A condition where the thyroid produces too much thyroid hormone.

conditions.name: Iron Deficiency Anemia
conditions.description: A blood disorder caused by insufficient iron, resulting in fewer red blood cells.

conditions.name: Anxiety Disorder
conditions.description: A mental health condition characterized by persistent, excessive worry.

conditions.name: Depression
conditions.description: A mood disorder causing persistent feelings of sadness and loss of interest.

conditions.name: Osteoarthritis
conditions.description: Degeneration of joint cartilage, causing pain and stiffness.

conditions.name: Rheumatoid Arthritis
conditions.description: An autoimmune disorder that primarily affects joints causing inflammation.

conditions.name: Eczema
conditions.description: A condition making the skin red, inflamed, and itchy.

conditions.name: Psoriasis
conditions.description: An autoimmune disease causing rapid skin cell growth and scaling patches.

conditions.name: Dengue Fever
conditions.description: A mosquito-borne viral infection causing severe flu-like illness.

conditions.name: Malaria
conditions.description: A life-threatening disease transmitted by infected mosquitoes.

conditions.name: Typhoid Fever
conditions.description: A bacterial infection spread through contaminated food and water.

conditions.name: Peptic Ulcer
conditions.description: Open sores on the inner lining of the stomach or upper small intestine.

conditions.name: Gallstones
conditions.description: Hardened deposits in the gallbladder that can cause abdominal pain.

conditions.name: Hepatitis A
conditions.description: A viral liver infection spread through contaminated food and water.

conditions.name: Hepatitis B
conditions.description: A serious liver infection caused by the hepatitis B virus.

conditions.name: Chickenpox
conditions.description: A highly contagious viral infection causing an itchy blister-like rash.

conditions.name: Scabies
conditions.description: A contagious skin infestation caused by tiny mites burrowing under the skin.

conditions.name: Fungal Infection (Skin)
conditions.description: Skin infections caused by various types of fungi, e.g., ringworm.

conditions.name: COVID-19
conditions.description: A respiratory illness caused by the SARS-CoV-2 virus.

conditions.name: Appendicitis
conditions.description: Inflammation of the appendix causing acute abdominal pain.

conditions.name: Haemorrhoids (Piles)
conditions.description: Swollen veins in the lower rectum causing discomfort and bleeding.

conditions.name: Polycystic Ovary Syndrome (PCOS)
conditions.description: A hormonal disorder causing irregular periods and polycystic ovaries.

conditions.name: Dysmenorrhea
conditions.description: Painful menstruation causing cramping in the lower abdomen.

conditions.name: Lower Back Pain (Muscular)
conditions.description: Pain in the lower back due to muscle strain or poor posture.

conditions.name: Cervical Spondylosis
conditions.description: Age-related wear of the spinal discs in the neck.

conditions.name: Peripheral Neuropathy
conditions.description: Damage to the peripheral nerves causing weakness, numbness, and pain.

conditions.name: Insomnia
conditions.description: A sleep disorder causing difficulty falling or staying asleep.

conditions.name: Panic Disorder
conditions.description: A type of anxiety disorder characterized by recurring panic attacks.

conditions.name: Vitamin D Deficiency
conditions.description: A common condition where the body lacks adequate Vitamin D.

conditions.name: Vitamin B12 Deficiency
conditions.description: Low B12 levels causing neurological and blood-related symptoms.

conditions.name: Dehydration
conditions.description: A condition where the body loses more fluids than it takes in.

conditions.name: Heat Stroke
conditions.description: A serious condition where the body overheats due to prolonged exposure to high temperatures.

conditions.name: Tonsillitis
conditions.description: Inflammation of the tonsils, usually due to viral or bacterial infection.

conditions.name: Dental Cavity
conditions.description: Permanently damaged areas in the hard surface of teeth.

conditions.name: Gingivitis
conditions.description: Inflammation of the gums due to plaque build-up.

conditions.name: Varicose Veins
conditions.description: Enlarged, twisted veins, commonly in the legs.

medicines.name: Paracetamol (Acetaminophen)
medicines.use: Reduces fever and relieves mild to moderate pain
medicines.precautions: Avoid alcohol; do not exceed recommended dose; caution in liver disease

medicines.name: Ibuprofen
medicines.use: Anti-inflammatory, relieves pain, reduces fever
medicines.precautions: Avoid on empty stomach; caution in kidney/stomach issues

medicines.name: Aspirin
medicines.use: Pain relief, fever reduction, blood thinning
medicines.dosage_guidance: 300–600mg every 4 hours; low-dose 75–100mg for cardiac use
medicines.precautions: Not for children under 16; avoid with blood thinners; avoid in bleeding disorders

medicines.name: Amoxicillin
medicines.use: Treats bacterial infections of the ear, throat, chest, and urinary tract
medicines.dosage_guidance: 250–500mg three times daily; complete full course
medicines.precautions: Check for penicillin allergy; complete the course

medicines.name: Cetirizine
medicines.use: Relieves symptoms of allergies, hay fever, hives
medicines.precautions: May cause drowsiness; avoid alcohol

medicines.name: Loratadine
medicines.use: Non-drowsy antihistamine for allergies and hives
medicines.precautions: Fewer sedation effects than older antihistamines

medicines.name: Omeprazole
medicines.use: Reduces stomach acid for heartburn, GERD, ulcers
medicines.precautions: Long-term use may affect B12 and magnesium levels

medicines.name: Pantoprazole
medicines.use: Treats acid reflux, GERD, and peptic ulcers
medicines.precautions: Not for long-term use without medical supervision

medicines.name: Ranitidine
medicines.use: Reduces stomach acid in heartburn and ulcers
medicines.precautions: Consult doctor for prolonged use; note: some brands recalled in some countries

medicines.name: Metformin
medicines.use: Controls blood sugar in Type 2 Diabetes
medicines.dosage_guidance: 500mg once or twice daily with meals; increase gradually
medicines.precautions: Monitor kidney function; take with food to reduce nausea

medicines.name: Amlodipine
medicines.use: Treats high blood pressure and chest pain (angina)
medicines.precautions: May cause ankle swelling; do not stop suddenly

medicines.name: Atenolol
medicines.use: Treats high blood pressure and heart rhythm problems
medicines.precautions: Do not stop abruptly; caution in asthma patients

medicines.name: Lisinopril
medicines.use: Treats high blood pressure and heart failure
medicines.precautions: May cause dry cough; check potassium levels regularly

medicines.name: Metronidazole
medicines.use: Treats bacterial and parasitic infections
medicines.precautions: Avoid alcohol during treatment and 48 hrs after

medicines.name: Azithromycin
medicines.use: Treats respiratory and skin infections
medicines.precautions: Take on empty stomach; watch for heart rhythm issues

medicines.name: Ciprofloxacin
medicines.use: Treats UTI, respiratory, and gastrointestinal infections
medicines.precautions: Drink plenty of water; avoid antacids within 2 hrs

medicines.name: Levothyroxine
medicines.use: Replaces thyroid hormone in hypothyroidism
medicines.dosage_guidance: Take on empty stomach 30 min before breakfast
medicines.precautions: Do not adjust dose without doctor approval; avoid calcium/iron supplements at same time

medicines.name: Salbutamol (Albuterol) Inhaler
medicines.use: Relieves asthma and breathing difficulty
medicines.dosage_guidance: 1–2 puffs as needed; not more than 4 times/day
medicines.precautions: Overuse can reduce effectiveness; use spacer for children

medicines.name: Montelukast
medicines.use: Prevents asthma attacks and relieves allergy symptoms
medicines.precautions: May affect mood and behaviour; report any mental health changes

medicines.name: Hydroxychloroquine
medicines.use: Treats malaria and rheumatoid arthritis
medicines.dosage_guidance: As directed by doctor; not for self-use
medicines.precautions: Regular eye checks needed for long-term use

medicines.name: Chloroquine
medicines.use: Prevents and treats malaria
medicines.precautions: Not used in regions with resistant strains; regular eye monitoring

medicines.name: Artemether + Lumefantrine
medicines.use: First-line treatment for uncomplicated malaria
medicines.dosage_guidance: 6 doses over 3 days; take with food
medicines.precautions: Complete the full course; do not use in first trimester

medicines.name: Domperidone
medicines.use: Relieves nausea, vomiting, and bloating
medicines.dosage_guidance: 10mg up to three times daily before meals
medicines.precautions: Not for long-term use; caution in heart conditions

medicines.name: Ondansetron
medicines.use: Prevents and treats nausea and vomiting
medicines.precautions: May affect heart rhythm; use minimum effective dose

medicines.name: ORS (Oral Rehydration Salts)
medicines.use: Rehydration during diarrhea, vomiting, and fever
medicines.dosage_guidance: Dissolve one sachet in 1 litre of clean water; drink as needed
medicines.precautions: Not a substitute for medical treatment in severe dehydration

medicines.name: Loperamide
medicines.use: Reduces diarrhea by slowing bowel movement
medicines.dosage_guidance: 4mg initially, then 2mg after each loose stool; max 16mg/day
medicines.precautions: Not for children under 2; stop if symptoms worsen after 48 hrs

medicines.name: Bisacodyl
medicines.use: Relieves occasional constipation
medicines.dosage_guidance: 5–10mg at night; effect usually in 6–12 hours
medicines.precautions: Not for prolonged use; ensure adequate fluid intake

medicines.name: Lactulose
medicines.use: Treats constipation and liver-related conditions
medicines.dosage_guidance: 15–30ml once or twice daily; adjust for effect
medicines.precautions: May cause bloating initially; drink plenty of fluids

medicines.name: Antacid (Aluminium Hydroxide + Magnesium Hydroxide)
medicines.use: Neutralises stomach acid for heartburn and indigestion
medicines.dosage_guidance: 1–2 tablets or 10ml after meals and at bedtime
medicines.precautions: Do not take within 2 hours of other medications

medicines.name: Simethicone
medicines.use: Relieves gas and bloating
medicines.precautions: Generally safe; not absorbed systemically

medicines.name: Diclofenac
medicines.use: Relieves pain and inflammation in joints and muscles
medicines.dosage_guidance: 25–50mg two to three times daily with food
medicines.precautions: Avoid in kidney/heart conditions; take with food

medicines.name: Naproxen
medicines.use: Treats pain, inflammation, and fever
medicines.precautions: Take with food; not for long-term use without supervision

medicines.name: Tramadol
medicines.use: Moderate to severe pain relief
medicines.precautions: Risk of dependence; avoid alcohol; not for children

medicines.name: Prednisolone
medicines.use: Reduces inflammation in allergic and autoimmune conditions
medicines.precautions: Do not stop abruptly; monitor blood sugar and bone density

medicines.name: Hydrocortisone Cream
medicines.use: Treats skin inflammation, eczema, and allergic rashes
medicines.precautions: Avoid on face and broken skin; not for long-term use

medicines.name: Clotrimazole Cream
medicines.use: Treats fungal skin infections like ringworm and athlete's foot
medicines.precautions: Continue use for full duration even if symptoms improve

medicines.name: Fluconazole
medicines.use: Treats yeast infections and fungal diseases
medicines.dosage_guidance: 150mg single dose for yeast infection; other infections as directed
medicines.precautions: Check for drug interactions; caution in liver disease

medicines.name: Acyclovir
medicines.use: Treats herpes simplex, chickenpox, and shingles
medicines.precautions: Stay well hydrated; start early in infection for best effect

medicines.name: Iron Supplement (Ferrous Sulphate)
medicines.use: Treats iron deficiency anemia
medicines.dosage_guidance: 200mg 2–3 times daily; take with Vitamin C for better absorption
medicines.precautions: May cause constipation and dark stools; take on empty stomach if tolerated

medicines.name: Folic Acid
medicines.use: Treats and prevents folate deficiency; essential in pregnancy
medicines.precautions: Essential for pregnant women; high doses need medical guidance

medicines.name: Vitamin D3 (Cholecalciferol)
medicines.use: Treats Vitamin D deficiency; supports bone health
medicines.dosage_guidance: 600–2000 IU daily; higher doses only as prescribed
medicines.precautions: Avoid high-dose supplementation without blood test

medicines.name: Vitamin B12 (Cyanocobalamin)
medicines.use: Treats B12 deficiency and nerve-related symptoms
medicines.precautions: Injections may be needed if absorption is poor

medicines.name: Calcium + Vitamin D3
medicines.use: Supports bone health; prevents osteoporosis
medicines.dosage_guidance: 500–1000mg Calcium with 400 IU D3 twice daily
medicines.precautions: Avoid excess calcium; separate from iron supplements

medicines.name: Zinc Supplement
medicines.use: Supports immunity, wound healing, and diarrhea treatment
medicines.precautions: Excessive zinc can interfere with copper absorption

medicines.name: Doxycycline
medicines.use: Treats bacterial infections and malaria prophylaxis
medicines.dosage_guidance: 100mg twice daily; take with food and water
medicines.precautions: Avoid sunlight exposure; not for children under 8 or pregnant women

medicines.name: Cephalexin
medicines.use: Treats skin, throat, and urinary tract bacterial infections
medicines.precautions: Complete full course; caution in penicillin allergy

medicines.name: Cotrimoxazole (Trimethoprim + Sulfamethoxazole)
medicines.use: Treats UTI, respiratory, and ear infections
medicines.dosage_guidance: One double-strength tablet twice daily for 5–10 days
medicines.precautions: Drink plenty of water; allergic reactions possible

medicines.name: Atorvastatin
medicines.use: Lowers cholesterol and reduces cardiovascular risk
medicines.precautions: Monitor liver enzymes; report muscle pain

medicines.name: Rosuvastatin
medicines.use: Reduces bad cholesterol (LDL) and triglycerides
medicines.precautions: Avoid grapefruit; monitor for muscle weakness

medicines.name: Warfarin
medicines.use: Blood thinner for preventing clots in heart conditions
medicines.dosage_guidance: Dose adjusted based on INR levels; as prescribed
medicines.precautions: Regular INR monitoring required; many food/drug interactions

medicines.name: Clopidogrel
medicines.use: Prevents blood clots after heart attack or stroke
medicines.precautions: Increased bleeding risk; avoid NSAIDs without doctor advice

medicines.name: Sertraline
medicines.use: Treats depression, anxiety, OCD, and PTSD
medicines.dosage_guidance: 50–200mg once daily; takes 4–6 weeks to show full effect
medicines.precautions: Do not stop abruptly; monitor for mood changes initially

medicines.name: Escitalopram
medicines.use: Treats depression and generalised anxiety disorder
medicines.precautions: May cause initial anxiety; do not stop suddenly

medicines.name: Alprazolam
medicines.use: Short-term relief of anxiety and panic disorders
medicines.precautions: Risk of dependence; avoid alcohol; not for long-term use

medicines.name: Melatonin
medicines.use: Helps regulate sleep-wake cycle for insomnia
medicines.precautions: Short-term use recommended; may cause drowsiness

medicines.name: Diphenhydramine
medicines.use: Antihistamine that also aids sleep and motion sickness
medicines.precautions: Causes significant drowsiness; not for long-term sleep use

medicines.name: Promethazine
medicines.use: Treats allergies, nausea, and motion sickness
medicines.precautions: Causes sedation; avoid driving; not for children under 2

medicines.name: Betahistine
medicines.use: Treats vertigo and Meniere's disease
medicines.precautions: Caution in asthma and peptic ulcer

medicines.name: Prochlorperazine
medicines.use: Treats nausea, vomiting, and vertigo
medicines.precautions: May cause drowsiness and movement side effects

medicines.name: Dexamethasone
medicines.use: Treats severe inflammation and allergic conditions
medicines.dosage_guidance: 0.5–10mg daily; taper as per doctor's advice
medicines.precautions: Do not stop abruptly; raises blood sugar; immune suppression

medicines.name: Mometasone Nasal Spray
medicines.use: Reduces nasal congestion and inflammation in allergic rhinitis
medicines.dosage_guidance: 2 sprays in each nostril once daily
medicines.precautions: For nasal use only; rinse mouth after use

medicines.name: Xylometazoline Nasal Drops
medicines.use: Relieves nasal congestion
medicines.dosage_guidance: 2–3 drops in each nostril every 8–10 hours; max 3 days
medicines.precautions: Do not use more than 3 days; rebound congestion may occur

medicines.name: Benzydamine Gargle / Spray
medicines.use: Relieves sore throat and mouth inflammation
medicines.precautions: Not for children under 6; do not swallow

medicines.name: Chlorhexidine Mouthwash
medicines.use: Prevents and treats gum disease and oral infections
medicines.dosage_guidance: Rinse with 10–15ml for 30 seconds twice daily
medicines.precautions: May stain teeth with prolonged use; do not swallow

medicines.name: Povidone-Iodine (Betadine)
medicines.use: Antiseptic for wound cleaning and skin infections
medicines.dosage_guidance: Apply diluted solution to affected area 1–2 times daily
medicines.precautions: Not for large wounds; avoid if thyroid issues present

medicines.name: Silver Sulfadiazine Cream
medicines.use: Prevents and treats infection in burns and wounds
medicines.dosage_guidance: Apply 1–2 times daily to affected area
medicines.precautions: Avoid in pregnancy; monitor for allergic reaction

medicines.name: Mupirocin Cream
medicines.use: Treats bacterial skin infections like impetigo
medicines.precautions: For external use only; avoid eyes

medicines.name: Permethrin Cream
medicines.use: Treats scabies and head lice
medicines.dosage_guidance: Apply full body below neck; wash off after 8–14 hours
medicines.precautions: Avoid eyes and broken skin; repeat in 1 week if needed

medicines.name: Albendazole
medicines.use: Treats intestinal worm infections
medicines.precautions: Avoid in pregnancy; take with fatty meal for best absorption

medicines.name: Mebendazole
medicines.use: Treats threadworm, roundworm, and hookworm infections
medicines.dosage_guidance: 100mg twice daily for 3 days or 500mg single dose
medicines.precautions: Treat all household members; ensure hand hygiene

medicines.name: Colchicine
medicines.use: Treats and prevents gout attacks
medicines.dosage_guidance: 0.5–1mg daily or as directed for acute attack
medicines.precautions: Do not exceed recommended dose; may cause diarrhea

medicines.name: Allopurinol
medicines.use: Reduces uric acid levels to prevent gout
medicines.precautions: Start after acute attack subsides; drink plenty of water

medicines.name: Furosemide
medicines.use: Reduces fluid retention in heart failure and hypertension
medicines.precautions: Monitor electrolytes; avoid at night

medicines.name: Spironolactone
medicines.use: Treats fluid retention and heart failure; used in PCOS
medicines.precautions: Monitor potassium levels; avoid in kidney failure

medicines.name: Glibenclamide
medicines.use: Lowers blood sugar in Type 2 Diabetes
medicines.precautions: Risk of hypoglycemia; avoid skipping meals

medicines.name: Insulin (Regular)
medicines.use: Controls blood glucose in diabetes (Type 1 and Type 2)
medicines.precautions: Monitor blood sugar frequently; proper injection technique required

medicines.name: Methylprednisolone
medicines.use: Reduces severe inflammation in autoimmune and allergic conditions
medicines.dosage_guidance: As prescribed; available as tablet and injection
medicines.precautions: Short courses preferred; taper gradually

medicines.name: Clobetasol Cream
medicines.use: Treats severe skin inflammation, psoriasis, and eczema
medicines.dosage_guidance: Apply thin layer once or twice daily for up to 2 weeks
medicines.precautions: Potent steroid; do not use on face or for extended periods

medicines.name: Calamine Lotion
medicines.use: Soothes itching from insect bites, rashes, and chickenpox
medicines.dosage_guidance: Apply to affected area as needed
medicines.precautions: External use only; avoid eyes; reapply as needed

medicines.name: Minoxidil (Topical)
medicines.use: Treats hair loss and stimulates hair regrowth
medicines.dosage_guidance: Apply 1ml twice daily to scalp; takes 3–6 months to see results
medicines.precautions: Do not use on broken skin; wash hands after application

medicines.name: Eye Drops (Lubricating / Artificial Tears)
medicines.use: Relieves dry, irritated eyes
medicines.dosage_guidance: 1–2 drops in each eye as needed
medicines.precautions: Discard 28 days after opening; avoid touching dropper tip to eye

medicines.name: Tobramycin Eye Drops
medicines.use: Treats bacterial eye infections
medicines.precautions: Complete full course; do not share eye drops

medicines.name: Ear Drops (Otosporin / Sofradex)
medicines.use: Treats ear infections and inflammation
medicines.dosage_guidance: 3–4 drops in affected ear 3–4 times daily
medicines.precautions: Warm drops to body temperature before use; do not use if eardrum is perforated

medicines.name: Nystatin
medicines.use: Treats oral and intestinal candida (yeast) infections
medicines.dosage_guidance: 100,000–500,000 units four times daily; swish and swallow
medicines.precautions: Complete full course; shake suspension well

medicines.name: Amlodipine + Atorvastatin Combination
medicines.use: Controls blood pressure and cholesterol simultaneously
medicines.dosage_guidance: As prescribed; once daily at night
medicines.precautions: Monitor liver and renal function; report muscle pain

medicines.name: Hydralazine
medicines.use: Treats high blood pressure
medicines.precautions: May cause rapid heart rate; often used in combination

medicines.name: Gabapentin
medicines.use: Treats nerve pain and seizures
medicines.precautions: Causes dizziness and sedation; do not stop abruptly

medicines.name: Pregabalin
medicines.use: Treats neuropathic pain, fibromyalgia, and anxiety
medicines.precautions: Risk of dizziness; do not stop abruptly; caution if operating machinery

medicines.name: Sucralfate
medicines.use: Treats peptic ulcers by coating the stomach lining
medicines.dosage_guidance: 1g four times daily on empty stomach
medicines.precautions: Separate from other medications by 2 hours

medicines.name: Mefenamic Acid
medicines.use: Treats period pain and mild to moderate pain
medicines.precautions: Not for more than 7 days; avoid in kidney disease

medicines.name: Tranexamic Acid
medicines.use: Reduces excessive menstrual bleeding and controls clotting
medicines.precautions: Not for use in thromboembolic conditions

medicines.name: Drotaverine
medicines.use: Relieves smooth muscle spasms in abdominal and pelvic pain
medicines.precautions: Avoid in severe heart/liver/kidney disease

medicines.name: Hyoscine Butylbromide
medicines.use: Treats abdominal cramps, IBS, and gastric spasm
medicines.precautions: Avoid in glaucoma; may cause dry mouth

medicines.name: Rabeprazole
medicines.use: Treats GERD, peptic ulcers, and stomach acid issues
medicines.precautions: Long-term use requires monitoring; may affect magnesium levels

medicines.name: Glimepiride
medicines.use: Lowers blood sugar in Type 2 Diabetes
medicines.precautions: Risk of hypoglycemia; do not skip meals

medicines.name: Sitagliptin
medicines.use: Manages blood sugar in Type 2 Diabetes
medicines.precautions: Adjust dose in kidney disease; rare risk of pancreatitis

medicines.name: Empagliflozin
medicines.use: Lowers blood sugar and has cardiovascular and kidney protective benefits
medicines.precautions: May cause genital infections; maintain hygiene

medicines.name: Clindamycin
medicines.use: Treats skin, bone, and dental bacterial infections
medicines.precautions: Take with full glass of water; report severe diarrhea (C. diff risk)

medicines.name: Tinidazole
medicines.use: Treats bacterial and parasitic gut infections
medicines.precautions: Avoid alcohol during and 72 hrs after treatment

medicines.name: Doxazosin
medicines.use: Treats high blood pressure and urinary symptoms
medicines.precautions: May cause dizziness on standing; start at night

medicines.name: Tamsulosin
medicines.use: Relieves urinary symptoms of enlarged prostate
medicines.precautions: Caution with other blood pressure medicines; may affect ejaculation

medicines.name: Multivitamin Tablet
medicines.use: Provides essential vitamins and minerals for overall health
medicines.precautions: Not a substitute for balanced diet; high-dose supplementation should be avoided

medicines.name: Probiotics (Lactobacillus)
medicines.use: Restores gut flora after antibiotics and treats IBS
medicines.dosage_guidance: One capsule daily with or after meals
medicines.precautions: Refrigerate if required; generally safe; immunocompromised patients should consult doctor

medicines.name: Ibuprofen (Advil, Motrin)
medicines.use: Relieves pain, reduces inflammation, and lowers fever
medicines.precautions: Take with food to prevent stomach upset; avoid in severe kidney disease or active ulcers

medicines.name: Loratadine (Claritin)
medicines.use: Treats allergies, hives, and allergic rhinitis without causing drowsiness
medicines.precautions: Caution in severe liver disease; consult doctor if pregnant

medicines.name: Cetirizine (Zyrtec)
medicines.use: Relieves allergy symptoms like runny nose, sneezing, and itchy eyes
medicines.precautions: May cause mild drowsiness; avoid alcohol

medicines.name: Omeprazole (Prilosec)
medicines.use: Treats GERD, stomach ulcers, and acid reflux
medicines.precautions: Do not chew or crush delayed-release capsules; long-term use may affect bone density

medicines.name: Pantoprazole (Protonix)
medicines.use: Reduces stomach acid, treats severe acid reflux and ulcers
medicines.precautions: May cause vitamin B12 deficiency on long-term use; watch for signs of magnesium deficiency

medicines.name: Metformin (Glucophage)
medicines.use: First-line treatment for Type 2 Diabetes to control blood sugar
medicines.precautions: Take with food to avoid nausea; monitor kidney function periodically; risk of lactic acidosis

medicines.name: Atorvastatin (Lipitor)
medicines.use: Lowers cholesterol and triglyceride levels, reducing heart disease risk
medicines.precautions: Avoid grapefruit juice; report unexplained muscle pain immediately; caution in liver disease

medicines.name: Rosuvastatin (Crestor)
medicines.use: Effectively lowers bad cholesterol (LDL) and increases good cholesterol (HDL)
medicines.precautions: Monitor liver function; watch for severe muscle cramps

medicines.name: Amoxicillin (Amoxil)
medicines.use: Treats bacterial infections such as ear, throat, and urinary tract infections
medicines.precautions: Finish entire course even if feeling better; do not use if allergic to penicillin

medicines.name: Azithromycin (Zithromax)
medicines.use: Treats respiratory infections, skin infections, and certain STDs
medicines.dosage_guidance: 500mg on day 1, then 250mg daily for 4 days
medicines.precautions: Can cause stomach upset; report irregular heartbeats; take at least 1 hour before antacids

medicines.name: Amlodipine (Norvasc)
medicines.use: Treats high blood pressure and chest pain (angina)
medicines.precautions: May cause swelling in ankles or feet; do not stop abruptly

medicines.name: Losartan (Cozaar)
medicines.use: Treats high blood pressure and protects kidneys in diabetics
medicines.precautions: Do not use in pregnancy; may increase potassium levels

medicines.name: Levothyroxine (Synthroid)
medicines.use: Treats hypothyroidism (underactive thyroid)
medicines.dosage_guidance: Varies individually; usually taken once daily on an empty stomach
medicines.precautions: Take 30-60 mins before breakfast; avoid calcium/iron supplements within 4 hours

medicines.name: Albuterol / Salbutamol (Ventolin)
medicines.use: Relieves asthma attacks, bronchospasm, and COPD symptoms
medicines.precautions: May cause fast heartbeat or tremors; use proper inhaler technique

medicines.name: Montelukast (Singulair)
medicines.use: Prevents asthma attacks and treats severe allergic rhinitis
medicines.precautions: Watch for mood changes or vivid dreams; not for acute asthma attacks

medicines.name: Ondansetron (Zofran)
medicines.use: Prevents nausea and vomiting caused by surgery, chemotherapy, or gastroenteritis
medicines.precautions: May cause headache or constipation; caution in irregular heartbeats

medicines.name: Aspirin (Ecotrin)
medicines.use: Relieves minor aches, reduces fever, and prevents blood clots/heart attacks
medicines.dosage_guidance: 75mg-81mg daily for heart protection; 325mg for pain
medicines.precautions: Do not give to children with fever (Reye's syndrome risk); watch for GI bleeding

medicines.name: Clopidogrel (Plavix)
medicines.use: Prevents stroke, heart attack, and other heart problems
medicines.precautions: Increases bleeding risk; tell your doctor before any surgery

medicines.name: Gabapentin (Neurontin)
medicines.use: Treats nerve pain and prevents seizures
medicines.precautions: Do not stop abruptly; causes dizziness and drowsiness

medicines.name: Sertraline (Zoloft)
medicines.use: Treats depression, panic attacks, OCD, and PTSD
medicines.precautions: May take weeks to work; do not stop suddenly; watch for mood changes

medicines.name: Escitalopram (Lexapro)
medicines.use: Treats depression and generalized anxiety disorder
medicines.precautions: Can cause nausea or drowsiness; risk of serotonin syndrome if mixed with certain meds

medicines.name: Alprazolam (Xanax)
medicines.use: Treats severe anxiety and panic disorders
medicines.precautions: High potential for dependence; do not mix with alcohol; causes extreme drowsiness

medicines.name: Zolpidem (Ambien)
medicines.use: Short-term treatment for insomnia
medicines.precautions: Ensure you have 7-8 hours to sleep; risk of complex sleep behaviors (sleepwalking)

medicines.name: Diphenhydramine (Benadryl)
medicines.use: Treats allergic reactions, motion sickness, and occasionally used as a sleep aid
medicines.precautions: Causes significant drowsiness; avoid driving; dry mouth is common

medicines.name: Loperamide (Imodium)
medicines.use: Treats acute and chronic diarrhea
medicines.dosage_guidance: 4mg initially, then 2mg after each loose stool (max 16mg/day)
medicines.precautions: Do not use if diarrhea is accompanied by high fever or bloody stools

medicines.name: Bismuth Subsalicylate (Pepto-Bismol)
medicines.use: Treats indigestion, heartburn, nausea, and diarrhea
medicines.dosage_guidance: 524mg every 30-60 mins as needed (max 8 doses in 24 hours)
medicines.precautions: May cause black stools or darkened tongue; do not use if allergic to aspirin

medicines.name: Docusate Sodium (Colace)
medicines.use: Stool softener used to treat occasional constipation
medicines.precautions: Drink plenty of water; not for immediate relief (takes 1-3 days)

medicines.name: Bisacodyl (Dulcolax)
medicines.use: Stimulant laxative for constipation relief or bowel prep
medicines.precautions: Do not chew or crush tablets; do not take within 1 hour of antacids or milk

medicines.name: Ciprofloxacin (Cipro)
medicines.use: Treats severe bacterial infections including UTI and respiratory infections
medicines.precautions: Risk of tendon rupture; avoid dairy products and antacids near dosing time

medicines.name: Levofloxacin (Levaquin)
medicines.use: Treats pneumonia, kidney infections, and sinus infections
medicines.precautions: May cause dizziness or tendon issues; stay hydrated

medicines.name: Doxycycline (Vibramycin)
medicines.use: Treats acne, rosacea, tick-borne diseases, and respiratory infections
medicines.precautions: Take with full glass of water; makes skin sensitive to sunlight; avoid in children under 8

medicines.name: Metronidazole (Flagyl)
medicines.use: Treats bacterial and parasitic infections (e.g., BV, Giardia)
medicines.precautions: Strictly avoid alcohol for at least 3 days after finishing course; causes metallic taste

medicines.name: Fluconazole (Diflucan)
medicines.use: Treats vaginal, oral, and systemic fungal/yeast infections
medicines.dosage_guidance: 150mg single dose for vaginal yeast infections
medicines.precautions: Caution in liver disease; interacts with many other medications

medicines.name: Valacyclovir (Valtrex)
medicines.use: Treats cold sores, genital herpes, and shingles
medicines.precautions: Drink plenty of water to protect kidneys; start at first sign of outbreak

medicines.name: Acyclovir (Zovirax)
medicines.use: Treats herpes simplex and varicella-zoster (chickenpox/shingles)
medicines.precautions: Requires frequent dosing; maintain hydration

medicines.name: Oseltamivir (Tamiflu)
medicines.use: Treats and prevents influenza (flu)
medicines.precautions: Must start within 48 hours of symptom onset; may cause nausea

medicines.name: Prednisone
medicines.use: Reduces severe inflammation, allergic reactions, and autoimmune flare-ups
medicines.precautions: Take with food; never stop abruptly; long term use causes weight gain and bone thinning

medicines.name: Dexamethasone (Decadron)
medicines.use: Treats severe inflammation, brain swelling, and severe asthma
medicines.precautions: Potent steroid; monitor blood sugar; can suppress immune system

medicines.name: Folic Acid (Vitamin B9)
medicines.use: Prevents neural tube defects in pregnancy; treats anemia
medicines.precautions: Excessively high doses can mask Vitamin B12 deficiency

medicines.name: Iron Supplement (Ferrous Sulfate)
medicines.use: Treats iron deficiency anemia
medicines.precautions: Take on empty stomach or with Vitamin C; causes black stools and constipation

medicines.name: Warfarin (Coumadin)
medicines.use: Prevents blood clots, deep vein thrombosis, and stroke in atrial fibrillation
medicines.dosage_guidance: Highly individualized based on INR blood tests
medicines.precautions: Requires strict diet (consistent Vitamin K); high risk of bleeding; many drug interactions

medicines.name: Apixaban (Eliquis)
medicines.use: Prevents blood clots and strokes without needing routine blood tests
medicines.precautions: Increases bleeding risk; do not stop suddenly without doctor's advice

medicines.name: Insulin Glargine (Lantus)
medicines.use: Long-acting insulin for Type 1 and Type 2 diabetes
medicines.dosage_guidance: Injected once daily under the skin
medicines.precautions: Monitor blood sugar closely; rotate injection sites; risk of hypoglycemia

medicines.name: Sildenafil (Viagra)
medicines.use: Treats erectile dysfunction and pulmonary arterial hypertension
medicines.precautions: Never take with nitrates (chest pain meds); seek help for erections lasting >4 hours

medicines.name: Tadalafil (Cialis)
medicines.use: Treats erectile dysfunction and enlarged prostate (BPH)
medicines.precautions: Effects last up to 36 hours; do not use with nitrates

medicines.name: Tamsulosin (Flomax)
medicines.use: Relieves urinary symptoms of enlarged prostate (BPH)
medicines.dosage_guidance: 0.4mg once daily after the same meal
medicines.precautions: May cause dizziness or drop in blood pressure when standing up

medicines.name: Finasteride (Proscar, Propecia)
medicines.use: Treats enlarged prostate and male pattern hair loss
medicines.dosage_guidance: 1mg for hair loss; 5mg for BPH daily
medicines.precautions: Women who are pregnant must not touch crushed tablets; may cause sexual side effects

medicines.name: Methylphenidate (Ritalin, Concerta)
medicines.use: Treats ADHD and narcolepsy
medicines.dosage_guidance: Varies by formulation; typically taken in the morning
medicines.precautions: Can cause insomnia, loss of appetite, and increased heart rate; high abuse potential

medicines.name: Amphetamine/Dextroamphetamine (Adderall)
medicines.use: Treats ADHD and narcolepsy
medicines.precautions: High addiction potential; monitor blood pressure; causes weight loss

medicines.name: Bupropion (Wellbutrin)
medicines.use: Treats depression and helps with smoking cessation
medicines.precautions: Lowers seizure threshold; do not use if history of seizures or eating disorders

medicines.name: Amitriptyline (Elavil)
medicines.use: Treats depression, nerve pain, and prevents migraines
medicines.precautions: Causes dry mouth, weight gain, and severe drowsiness; risk of arrhythmias

medicines.name: Diclofenac (Voltaren)
medicines.use: Strong pain relief for arthritis, gout, and joint pain
medicines.dosage_guidance: 50mg 2-3 times daily; or as a topical gel
medicines.precautions: High risk of stomach ulcers; avoid in heart disease

medicines.name: Naproxen (Aleve)
medicines.use: Relieves pain, inflammation, and menstrual cramps
medicines.precautions: Longer acting than ibuprofen; take with food to protect stomach

medicines.name: Meloxicam (Mobic)
medicines.use: Treats osteoarthritis and rheumatoid arthritis
medicines.precautions: Take with food; monitor for stomach pain and bleeding

medicines.name: Celecoxib (Celebrex)
medicines.use: Treats arthritis and acute pain with lower risk of stomach ulcers
medicines.precautions: Do not use if allergic to sulfa drugs; carries cardiovascular risks

medicines.name: Allopurinol (Zyloprim)
medicines.use: Prevents gout attacks and kidney stones by lowering uric acid
medicines.precautions: Drink plenty of water; stop immediately if skin rash occurs (serious risk)

medicines.name: Colchicine (Colcrys)
medicines.use: Treats and prevents acute gout flare-ups
medicines.dosage_guidance: 1.2mg at first sign of flare, then 0.6mg an hour later
medicines.precautions: High toxicity risk; can cause severe diarrhea and muscle weakness
medicines.alternative: NSAIDs or Corticosteroids for acute attacks

medicines.name: Propranolol (Inderal)
medicines.use: Treats high blood pressure, tremors, performance anxiety, and prevents migraines
medicines.precautions: Avoid in asthma; do not stop abruptly; causes fatigue

medicines.name: Metoprolol (Lopressor, Toprol XL)
medicines.use: Treats high blood pressure, angina, and heart failure
medicines.precautions: May cause dizziness or slow heart rate; take with food

medicines.name: Lisinopril (Prinivil, Zestril)
medicines.use: Treats high blood pressure and heart failure; protects diabetic kidneys
medicines.precautions: Can cause a persistent dry cough; do not use in pregnancy

medicines.name: Furosemide (Lasix)
medicines.use: Strong diuretic (water pill) used to treat fluid retention and edema
medicines.precautions: Will cause frequent urination; depletes potassium (may need supplement)

medicines.name: Hydrochlorothiazide (HCTZ)
medicines.use: Mild diuretic used to treat high blood pressure
medicines.precautions: Take in the morning to avoid night urination; increases sun sensitivity

medicines.name: Spironolactone (Aldactone)
medicines.use: Treats heart failure, edema, and hormonal acne
medicines.precautions: Potassium-sparing (do not take potassium supplements); may cause breast tenderness

medicines.name: Clonidine (Catapres)
medicines.use: Treats high blood pressure, ADHD, and withdrawal symptoms
medicines.precautions: Causes severe dry mouth and sedation; rebound high BP if stopped abruptly

medicines.name: Duloxetine (Cymbalta)
medicines.use: Treats depression, anxiety, fibromyalgia, and nerve pain
medicines.precautions: Can cause nausea and sweating; difficult to stop taking (withdrawals)

medicines.name: Venlafaxine (Effexor)
medicines.use: Treats severe depression and anxiety disorders
medicines.precautions: May increase blood pressure; severe withdrawal symptoms if missed a dose

medicines.name: Quetiapine (Seroquel)
medicines.use: Treats schizophrenia, bipolar disorder, and sometimes insomnia
medicines.precautions: Causes significant weight gain and severe drowsiness; monitor blood sugar

medicines.name: Aripiprazole (Abilify)
medicines.use: Treats bipolar disorder, schizophrenia, and depression
medicines.precautions: May cause restlessness or compulsive behaviors (gambling, eating)

medicines.name: Lithium (Lithobid)
medicines.use: Mood stabilizer for bipolar disorder
medicines.dosage_guidance: Varies; guided by frequent blood level tests
medicines.precautions: Requires blood tests for toxicity; stay hydrated and maintain normal salt intake

medicines.name: Lamotrigine (Lamictal)
medicines.use: Prevents bipolar depression and treats seizures
medicines.dosage_guidance: Must be slowly titrated up from 25mg
medicines.precautions: Risk of life-threatening rash (Stevens-Johnson syndrome) if escalated too fast

medicines.name: Topiramate (Topamax)
medicines.use: Prevents migraines and treats seizures
medicines.precautions: Can cause weight loss, memory issues ('brain fog'), and kidney stones

medicines.name: Sumatriptan (Imitrex)
medicines.use: Stops acute migraine headaches
medicines.precautions: Causes tightness in chest/throat; avoid if you have history of heart attack or stroke

medicines.name: Cyclobenzaprine (Flexeril)
medicines.use: Treats muscle spasms and back pain
medicines.precautions: Highly sedating; do not drive; causes severe dry mouth

medicines.name: Tizanidine (Zanaflex)
medicines.use: Treats severe muscle spasticity (e.g., in MS)
medicines.precautions: Causes low blood pressure and drowsiness; monitor liver enzymes

medicines.name: Levocetirizine (Xyzal)
medicines.use: Treats allergies and hives
medicines.precautions: Can cause mild drowsiness; avoid alcohol

medicines.name: Fluticasone nasal spray (Flonase)
medicines.use: Prevents and treats nasal allergy symptoms (stuffy/runny nose)
medicines.precautions: Takes days to work optimally; may cause minor nosebleeds

medicines.name: Budesonide inhaler (Pulmicort)
medicines.use: Controller inhaler to prevent asthma attacks
medicines.precautions: Rinse mouth with water and spit after use to prevent oral thrush

medicines.name: Alendronate (Fosamax)
medicines.use: Treats and prevents osteoporosis
medicines.precautions: Take with full glass of water first thing in morning; must stand/sit upright for 30 mins after

medicines.name: Tretinoin topical (Retin-A)
medicines.use: Treats severe acne and reduces fine wrinkles
medicines.precautions: Makes skin highly sensitive to sun; causes initial redness and peeling

medicines.name: Mupirocin topical (Bactroban)
medicines.use: Treats skin infections like impetigo and MRSA colonization
medicines.precautions: For external use only; finish the entire prescribed duration

medicines.name: Clotrimazole topical (Lotrimin)
medicines.use: Treats athlete's foot, jock itch, and ringworm
medicines.precautions: Keep affected area clean and dry

medicines.name: Ketoconazole shampoo (Nizoral)
medicines.use: Treats severe dandruff and fungal scalp conditions
medicines.dosage_guidance: Use every 3-4 days; leave on scalp for 5 mins
medicines.precautions: Can cause hair dryness or slight discoloration

medicines.name: Mirtazapine (Remeron)
medicines.use: Treats depression, and helps with insomnia and appetite loss
medicines.precautions: Causes significant weight gain and drowsiness; lower doses are more sedating than higher ones

medicines.name: Trazodone
medicines.use: Primarily used off-label for insomnia; treats depression at high doses
medicines.precautions: Can cause grogginess the next day; rare risk of prolonged erection (priapism)

medicines.name: Tramadol (Ultram)
medicines.use: Treats moderate to severe pain
medicines.precautions: Risk of addiction; lowers seizure threshold; risk of serotonin syndrome

medicines.name: Oxycodone/Acetaminophen (Percocet)
medicines.use: Treats severe pain not relieved by non-opioids
medicines.precautions: High addiction and overdose risk; causes constipation; do not combine with alcohol or benzos

medicines.name: Codeine/Guaifenesin
medicines.use: Prescription cough suppressant for severe cough
medicines.precautions: Can cause drowsiness and constipation; potential for abuse

medicines.name: Dextromethorphan (Delsym, Robitussin)
medicines.use: Over-the-counter cough suppressant
medicines.dosage_guidance: Varies by formulation; typically 15mg-30mg every 6-8 hours
medicines.precautions: Do not use if taking MAOI antidepressants; does not cure the underlying cause

medicines.name: Guaifenesin (Mucinex)
medicines.use: Thins and loosens mucus in chest congestion
medicines.precautions: Drink plenty of water to help thin the mucus

medicines.name: Pseudoephedrine (Sudafed)
medicines.use: Relieves severe nasal and sinus congestion
medicines.precautions: Can raise blood pressure and cause insomnia; avoid taking near bedtime

medicines.name: Phenylephrine
medicines.use: Over-the-counter decongestant for stuffy nose
medicines.precautions: Less effective than pseudoephedrine but does not require pharmacy check

medicines.name: Oxybutynin (Ditropan)
medicines.use: Treats overactive bladder and urinary incontinence
medicines.precautions: Causes significant dry mouth and constipation; avoid overheating as it reduces sweating

medicines.name: Mirabegron (Myrbetriq)
medicines.use: Treats overactive bladder with fewer dry mouth side effects
medicines.precautions: Can raise blood pressure; monitor regularly

medicines.name: Donepezil (Aricept)
medicines.use: Treats symptoms of Alzheimer's disease and dementia
medicines.precautions: Can cause nausea, diarrhea, and slow heart rate; does not cure Alzheimer's

medicines.name: Memantine (Namenda)
medicines.use: Treats moderate to severe Alzheimer's disease
medicines.precautions: Can cause dizziness and confusion; often used with Donepezil

medicines.name: Methotrexate
medicines.use: Treats severe rheumatoid arthritis, psoriasis, and certain cancers
medicines.dosage_guidance: Typically taken ONCE WEEKLY (not daily) for arthritis
medicines.precautions: Highly toxic; requires strict folic acid supplementation and regular liver/blood tests; strictly avoid in pregnancy

medicines.name: Hydroxychloroquine (Plaquenil)
medicines.use: Treats lupus, rheumatoid arthritis, and prevents malaria
medicines.precautions: Requires regular eye exams due to risk of retinal toxicity; take with food

medicines.name: Buprenorphine/Naloxone (Suboxone)
medicines.use: Treats opioid use disorder and prevents withdrawal
medicines.precautions: Can cause fatal respiratory depression if mixed with benzos or alcohol

medicines.name: Methadone
medicines.use: Treats severe chronic pain and opioid dependence
medicines.dosage_guidance: Administered strictly via certified clinics for dependence
medicines.precautions: Extremely high overdose risk; prolongs QT interval in heart

medicines.name: Levetiracetam (Keppra)
medicines.use: Prevents and treats seizures
medicines.precautions: Can cause extreme mood swings, aggression, and depression ('Keppra rage')

medicines.name: Pregabalin (Lyrica)
medicines.use: Treats nerve pain, fibromyalgia, and prevents seizures
medicines.precautions: May cause weight gain, swelling, and dizziness; taper slowly to stop

medicines.name: Risperidone (Risperdal)
medicines.use: Treats schizophrenia, bipolar mania, and irritability in autism
medicines.precautions: May increase prolactin levels leading to breast enlargement (even in males); risk of weight gain

medicines.name: Olanzapine (Zyprexa)
medicines.use: Treats schizophrenia and bipolar disorder
medicines.precautions: Causes massive weight gain and high blood sugar; monitor metabolic panels

medicines.name: Naloxone (Narcan)
medicines.use: Reverses opioid overdoses
medicines.dosage_guidance: 4mg nasal spray; repeat every 2-3 mins if no response
medicines.precautions: Immediately call 911 after administering; induces sudden withdrawal

medicines.name: Naltrexone (Vivitrol)
medicines.use: Prevents relapse in alcohol and opioid use disorders
medicines.precautions: Must be completely opioid-free for 7-10 days before starting to avoid severe withdrawal

medicines.name: Acamprosate (Campral)
medicines.use: Helps maintain alcohol abstinence
medicines.precautions: Not effective if patient is still actively drinking; requires frequent dosing

medicines.name: Disulfiram (Antabuse)
medicines.use: Deterrent for alcohol use
medicines.precautions: Causes violent vomiting, flushing, and heart palpitations if ANY alcohol is consumed (even mouthwash)

medicines.name: Varenicline (Chantix)
medicines.use: Helps quit smoking by blocking nicotine receptors
medicines.precautions: May cause vivid nightmares and mood changes; take with full glass of water

medicines.name: Liraglutide (Victoza, Saxenda)
medicines.use: Treats Type 2 Diabetes and aids in weight loss
medicines.precautions: May cause severe nausea; risk of thyroid tumors (animal studies)

medicines.name: Semaglutide (Ozempic, Wegovy)
medicines.use: Treats Type 2 Diabetes and significant weight loss aid
medicines.precautions: Causes delayed gastric emptying (nausea, vomiting); risk of pancreatitis

medicines.name: Tirzepatide (Mounjaro)
medicines.use: Treats Type 2 Diabetes; highly effective for weight loss
medicines.precautions: Monitor for severe gastrointestinal issues; adjust dose slowly

medicines.name: Sitagliptin (Januvia)
medicines.use: Treats Type 2 diabetes by increasing insulin release
medicines.precautions: Risk of joint pain and pancreatitis; well tolerated overall

medicines.name: Empagliflozin (Jardiance)
medicines.use: Treats Type 2 diabetes and reduces risk of heart failure
medicines.precautions: Causes sugar in urine leading to high risk of yeast infections and UTIs

medicines.name: Dapagliflozin (Farxiga)
medicines.use: Treats Type 2 diabetes, heart failure, and chronic kidney disease
medicines.precautions: Risk of severe urinary infections; keeps kidneys functioning longer

medicines.name: Gliclazide (Diamicron)
medicines.use: Treats Type 2 diabetes by stimulating pancreas to make more insulin
medicines.precautions: High risk of low blood sugar (hypoglycemia); must take with food

medicines.name: Ezetimibe (Zetia)
medicines.use: Lowers cholesterol by blocking absorption in the intestine
medicines.precautions: Often used alongside a statin; monitor liver function

medicines.name: Evolocumab (Repatha)
medicines.use: Dramatically lowers LDL (bad) cholesterol
medicines.precautions: Expensive; may cause injection site reactions or muscle pain

medicines.name: Amiodarone (Pacerone)
medicines.use: Treats life-threatening irregular heartbeats (arrhythmias)
medicines.dosage_guidance: Varies highly; usually 100mg-200mg daily for maintenance
medicines.precautions: Highly toxic to lungs, thyroid, and eyes; requires constant monitoring

medicines.name: Digoxin (Lanoxin)
medicines.use: Treats heart failure and atrial fibrillation
medicines.precautions: Narrow therapeutic window; toxicity causes nausea and yellow-tinted vision

medicines.name: Rivaroxaban (Xarelto)
medicines.use: Prevents blood clots, stroke, and treats deep vein thrombosis
medicines.precautions: Must be taken with evening meal; high risk of bleeding; no routine blood tests needed

medicines.name: Dabigatran (Pradaxa)
medicines.use: Prevents blood clots and stroke
medicines.precautions: Capsules must be kept in original bottle to prevent moisture damage; bleeding risk

medicines.name: Enoxaparin (Lovenox)
medicines.use: Prevents and treats blood clots; often used post-surgery or in pregnancy
medicines.dosage_guidance: Subcutaneous injection daily or twice daily
medicines.precautions: May cause bruising at injection site; monitor platelet counts

medicines.name: Clindamycin (Cleocin)
medicines.use: Treats serious bacterial infections, acne, and dental infections
medicines.precautions: High risk of causing severe C. difficile diarrhea; stop if diarrhea occurs

medicines.name: Vancomycin (Vancocin)
medicines.use: Treats severe MRSA infections and C. difficile (oral form only)
medicines.dosage_guidance: Varies heavily; IV for systemic, oral for GI
medicines.precautions: Can cause kidney damage or 'Red Man Syndrome' if given via IV too fast

medicines.name: Cefalexin (Keflex)
medicines.use: Treats skin, ear, and urinary tract infections
medicines.precautions: Caution if allergic to penicillin; take with food to avoid nausea

medicines.name: Nitrofurantoin (Macrobid)
medicines.use: Treats and prevents uncomplicated urinary tract infections (UTIs)
medicines.precautions: Will turn urine brown/dark yellow; take with food; avoid in poor kidney function

medicines.name: Sulfamethoxazole/Trimethoprim (Bactrim)
medicines.use: Treats UTIs, MRSA skin infections, and certain pneumonias
medicines.precautions: High risk of allergic skin reactions (sulfa allergy); drink plenty of water

medicines.name: Terbinafine (Lamisil)
medicines.use: Treats fungal nail infections and severe ringworm
medicines.precautions: Oral form requires liver function tests; can cause temporary taste loss

medicines.name: Itraconazole (Sporanox)
medicines.use: Treats severe systemic fungal infections and nail fungus
medicines.precautions: Avoid in heart failure; interacts with numerous medications

medicines.name: Mupirocin (Bactroban)
medicines.use: Topical antibiotic for impetigo and MRSA in the nose
medicines.dosage_guidance: Apply to affected area 3 times daily
medicines.precautions: For external use only; clean area before applying

medicines.name: Tretinoin (Retin-A)
medicines.use: Topical treatment for acne, wrinkles, and sun damage
medicines.precautions: Makes skin extremely sensitive to sun; causes initial purging/peeling

medicines.name: Adapalene (Differin)
medicines.use: Topical acne treatment
medicines.precautions: Less irritating than Tretinoin but still causes sun sensitivity

medicines.name: Benzoyl Peroxide
medicines.use: Over-the-counter topical treatment for acne
medicines.dosage_guidance: Wash or gel used 1-2 times daily
medicines.precautions: Bleaches hair and fabrics/towels; can dry out skin

medicines.name: Isotretinoin (Accutane)
medicines.use: Treats severe, cystic acne that hasn't responded to other treatments
medicines.dosage_guidance: Dosed by weight; daily for 4-6 months
medicines.precautions: Causes severe birth defects; requires strict pregnancy prevention (iPLEDGE); causes extreme dry skin

medicines.name: Finasteride (Propecia, Proscar)
medicines.use: Treats male pattern baldness and enlarged prostate
medicines.dosage_guidance: 1mg daily for hair loss; 5mg for prostate
medicines.precautions: Can cause sexual dysfunction; women who are pregnant must not handle crushed pills

medicines.name: Minoxidil (Rogaine)
medicines.use: Topical solution or oral pill to stimulate hair growth
medicines.precautions: Oral form lowers blood pressure and can cause fluid retention; toxic to cats

medicines.name: Fluoxetine (Prozac)
medicines.use: Treats depression, OCD, bulimia, and panic disorder
medicines.precautions: Long half-life means it stays in body for weeks after stopping; take in the morning

medicines.name: Trazodone (Desyrel)
medicines.use: Treats depression, but most commonly used off-label for insomnia
medicines.precautions: May cause grogginess the next day; rare risk of prolonged erection

medicines.name: Clonazepam (Klonopin)
medicines.use: Treats panic disorder, seizures, and anxiety
medicines.precautions: Longer acting than Xanax; severe withdrawal if stopped abruptly

medicines.name: Lorazepam (Ativan)
medicines.use: Treats acute anxiety, seizures, and alcohol withdrawal
medicines.precautions: High risk of dependence; causes memory impairment

medicines.name: Diazepam (Valium)
medicines.use: Treats anxiety, muscle spasms, and alcohol withdrawal
medicines.precautions: Very long-acting; accumulates in the body causing prolonged sedation

medicines.name: Eszopiclone (Lunesta)
medicines.use: Treats insomnia for staying asleep
medicines.precautions: Can cause an unpleasant metallic taste in the mouth

medicines.name: Promethazine (Phenergan)
medicines.use: Treats nausea, vomiting, allergies, and motion sickness
medicines.precautions: Highly sedating; do not use in children under 2 (respiratory depression)

medicines.name: Metoclopramide (Reglan)
medicines.use: Treats gastroparesis and severe nausea
medicines.precautions: Can cause irreversible muscle spasms/twitches (tardive dyskinesia)

medicines.name: Famotidine (Pepcid)
medicines.use: Prevents and treats heartburn and acid indigestion
medicines.precautions: Fewer drug interactions than PPIs; can take as-needed

medicines.name: Docusate (Colace)
medicines.use: Stool softener for gentle relief of constipation
medicines.precautions: Take with plenty of water; takes a few days to work

medicines.name: Polyethylene Glycol (Miralax)
medicines.use: Osmotic laxative for constipation
medicines.precautions: Safe for long-term use; takes 1-3 days to produce a bowel movement

medicines.name: Methimazole (Tapazole)
medicines.use: Treats hyperthyroidism (overactive thyroid)
medicines.precautions: Can suppress white blood cells (watch for sore throat/fever); liver toxicity

medicines.name: Estradiol (Estrace)
medicines.use: Hormone replacement therapy for menopause symptoms
medicines.dosage_guidance: Oral pill, patch, or cream depending on formulation
medicines.precautions: Increases risk of blood clots and certain cancers; do not smoke

medicines.name: Levonorgestrel/Ethinyl Estradiol
medicines.use: Combination oral contraceptive (birth control)
medicines.dosage_guidance: Take 1 pill at the exact same time every day
medicines.precautions: Does not protect against STIs; high risk of blood clots if patient smokes over age 35

medicines.name: Levonorgestrel (Plan B One-Step)
medicines.use: Emergency contraception to prevent pregnancy after unprotected sex
medicines.dosage_guidance: 1.5mg single dose within 72 hours of unprotected sex
medicines.precautions: May cause nausea and irregular bleeding; less effective in heavier individuals

medicines.name: Adalimumab (Humira)
medicines.use: Treats severe rheumatoid arthritis, Crohn's disease, and psoriasis
medicines.precautions: Lowers immune system significantly; test for tuberculosis before starting

medicines.name: Albuterol (Ventolin, ProAir)
medicines.use: Rescue inhaler for acute asthma and COPD symptoms
medicines.precautions: Causes jitteriness, high heart rate; rinse mouth if using combo inhalers

medicines.name: Fluticasone/Salmeterol (Advair)
medicines.use: Maintenance inhaler for asthma and COPD
medicines.precautions: Must rinse mouth after use to prevent oral thrush; not for acute attacks

medicines.name: Tiotropium (Spiriva)
medicines.use: Maintenance inhaler for COPD
medicines.precautions: Do not swallow the capsules; can cause dry mouth

medicines.name: Methocarbamol (Robaxin)
medicines.use: Treats muscle spasms and pain
medicines.precautions: Less sedating than cyclobenzaprine; may turn urine black, brown, or green

medicines.name: Oxycodone (Roxicodone)
medicines.use: Treats moderate to severe acute pain
medicines.precautions: High addiction potential; severe respiratory depression risk

medicines.name: Hydrocodone/Acetaminophen (Vicodin, Norco)
medicines.use: Treats moderate to severe pain
medicines.precautions: Contains Tylenol; do not exceed 4000mg of acetaminophen per day to avoid liver failure

medicines.name: Lidocaine patches (Lidoderm)
medicines.use: Topical pain relief for localized nerve pain (e.g., post-shingles)
medicines.dosage_guidance: Apply up to 3 patches for 12 hours on, 12 hours off
medicines.precautions: Do not leave on for >12 hours to avoid systemic toxicity

medicines.name: Amiodarone (Cordarone)
medicines.use: Treats dangerous irregular heart rhythms
medicines.precautions: Toxic to lungs, thyroid, liver; can cause skin to turn blue-gray in sun

medicines.name: Digoxin (Lanoxin)
medicines.use: Treats heart failure and atrial fibrillation
medicines.precautions: Very narrow safety margin; toxicity causes nausea, confusion, and visual changes (yellow halos)

medicines.name: Isosorbide Mononitrate (Imdur)
medicines.use: Prevents angina (chest pain)
medicines.precautions: Causes severe headaches and dizziness; never take with PDE5 inhibitors (Viagra)

medicines.name: Nitroglycerin sublingual (Nitrostat)
medicines.use: Treats acute angina (chest pain) attacks
medicines.dosage_guidance: 0.4mg under tongue every 5 mins up to 3 doses
medicines.precautions: Call 911 if pain persists after first dose; do not swallow

medicines.name: Cyanocobalamin (Vitamin B12)
medicines.use: Treats pernicious anemia and B12 deficiency
medicines.precautions: Safe; excess is excreted in urine

medicines.name: Iron (Ferrous Sulfate)
medicines.use: Treats iron deficiency anemia
medicines.precautions: Causes constipation and black stools; take on empty stomach with Vitamin C for best absorption

medicines.name: Potassium Chloride (Klor-Con)
medicines.use: Treats or prevents low potassium (often caused by diuretics)
medicines.precautions: Can cause severe stomach irritation; swallow pill whole with food and water

medicines.name: Amoxicillin/Clavulanate (Augmentin)
medicines.use: Treats bacterial infections such as pneumonia, ear infections, and sinusitis
medicines.precautions: Take with food to minimize GI upset; risk of severe diarrhea

medicines.name: Bictegravir/Emtricitabine/Tenofovir alafenamide (Biktarvy)
medicines.use: Complete regimen for HIV-1 treatment
medicines.precautions: Monitor kidney and bone density; risk of lactic acidosis

medicines.name: Lisinopril (Zestril)
medicines.use: Treats high blood pressure, heart failure, and protects kidneys in diabetes
medicines.precautions: Can cause a persistent dry cough and elevated potassium levels; avoid in pregnancy

medicines.name: Albuterol (ProAir, Ventolin)
medicines.use: Relieves acute bronchospasm in asthma and COPD
medicines.precautions: Can cause tremors, rapid heart rate, and nervousness

medicines.name: Fluticasone (Flonase)
medicines.use: Treats nasal congestion, sneezing, and allergy symptoms
medicines.precautions: May cause nosebleeds; takes a few days to reach full effect

medicines.name: Glipizide (Glucotrol)
medicines.use: Lowers blood sugar in Type 2 diabetes
medicines.precautions: Can cause severe low blood sugar (hypoglycemia) and weight gain

medicines.name: Acetaminophen (Tylenol)
medicines.use: Relieves pain and reduces fever
medicines.precautions: Do not exceed 4000mg per day to prevent severe liver damage

medicines.name: Oxycodone (Roxicodone, OxyContin)
medicines.use: Treats severe pain
medicines.precautions: Extremely high risk for addiction and respiratory depression

medicines.name: Latanoprost (Xalatan)
medicines.use: Treats glaucoma by lowering pressure in the eye
medicines.dosage_guidance: 1 drop in affected eye(s) once daily in the evening
medicines.precautions: Can permanently change eye color to brown and increase eyelash growth

medicines.name: Benzonatate (Tessalon Perles)
medicines.use: Relieves cough by numbing the throat and lungs
medicines.precautions: Swallow whole; chewing can cause dangerous numbness in the mouth/throat

medicines.name: Divalproex (Depakote)
medicines.use: Treats bipolar mania, seizures, and prevents migraines
medicines.precautions: Toxic to liver; severe birth defects; causes weight gain and hair loss

medicines.name: Bactrim (Sulfamethoxazole/Trimethoprim)
medicines.use: Treats UTIs, skin infections (MRSA), and bronchitis
medicines.precautions: Avoid if sulfa allergy exists; drink lots of water; causes sun sensitivity

medicines.name: Cefdinir (Omnicef)
medicines.use: Treats ear infections, sinus infections, and bronchitis
medicines.precautions: May cause reddish stools if taken with iron supplements

medicines.name: Methotrexate (Trexall)
medicines.use: Treats rheumatoid arthritis, psoriasis, and some cancers
medicines.precautions: Highly toxic; requires folic acid supplementation; severe birth defects

medicines.name: Carbidopa/Levodopa (Sinemet)
medicines.use: First-line treatment for Parkinson's disease
medicines.precautions: Can cause dyskinesias (involuntary movements); darkens urine/sweat

medicines.name: Pramipexole (Mirapex)
medicines.use: Treats Parkinson's disease and Restless Legs Syndrome
medicines.precautions: Can cause sudden sleep attacks and compulsive behaviors (e.g., gambling)

medicines.name: Baclofen (Lioresal)
medicines.use: Treats severe muscle spasticity (e.g., in MS or spinal cord injury)
medicines.precautions: Do not stop abruptly to avoid severe withdrawal/seizures; causes sedation

medicines.name: Lidocaine Patch (Lidoderm)
medicines.use: Topical pain relief for shingles (postherpetic neuralgia)
medicines.dosage_guidance: Apply up to 3 patches for 12 hours on, 12 hours off
medicines.precautions: Do not wear for more than 12 hours to prevent toxicity

medicines.name: Meclizine (Antivert)
medicines.use: Treats vertigo and motion sickness
medicines.precautions: Causes drowsiness; take 1 hour before travel for motion sickness

medicines.name: Ketorolac (Toradol)
medicines.use: Short-term treatment of moderate to severe pain
medicines.precautions: DO NOT use for more than 5 days total due to severe bleeding/kidney risk

medicines.name: Chlorpheniramine (Chlor-Trimeton)
medicines.use: Treats allergy, cold, and hay fever symptoms
medicines.precautions: First-generation antihistamine; causes significant drowsiness

medicines.name: Fenofibrate (Tricor)
medicines.use: Lowers very high triglycerides
medicines.precautions: Can increase risk of muscle pain if taken with a statin

medicines.name: Levonorgestrel (Plan B)
medicines.use: Emergency contraception
medicines.dosage_guidance: 1.5mg single dose within 72 hours of unprotected sex
medicines.precautions: May cause irregular bleeding/nausea; less effective in heavier individuals

medicines.name: Ethinyl Estradiol / Norethindrone
medicines.use: Oral contraceptive (birth control pill)
medicines.dosage_guidance: Take 1 pill at the exact same time every day
medicines.precautions: Does not protect against STIs; increased risk of blood clots if smoking

medicines.name: Fexofenadine (Allegra)
medicines.use: Treats seasonal allergy symptoms
medicines.precautions: Do not take with fruit juices (apple, orange, grapefruit) as they decrease absorption

medicines.name: Esomeprazole (Nexium)
medicines.use: Treats GERD, stomach ulcers, and acid reflux
medicines.precautions: Long-term use may lower bone density and magnesium levels

medicines.name: Ranitidine (Zantac)
medicines.use: Treats and prevents heartburn
medicines.precautions: Note: Has been recalled in many countries due to NDMA impurities

medicines.name: Senna (Senokot)
medicines.use: Stimulant laxative to relieve constipation
medicines.precautions: May cause urine to turn a reddish-brown color; do not use long-term

medicines.name: Lactulose (Enulose)
medicines.use: Treats constipation and hepatic encephalopathy
medicines.precautions: May cause gas and bloating; takes 24-48 hours to produce a bowel movement

medicines.name: Calcium Carbonate (Tums)
medicines.use: Relieves heartburn, acid indigestion, and acts as a calcium supplement
medicines.precautions: Can cause constipation; do not exceed max daily dose to prevent kidney stones

medicines.name: Clarithromycin (Biaxin)
medicines.use: Treats respiratory, skin, and H. pylori stomach infections
medicines.precautions: Strong metallic taste in mouth; many drug interactions

medicines.name: Minocycline (Minocin)
medicines.use: Treats severe acne and certain bacterial infections
medicines.precautions: May cause dizziness or vertigo; sun sensitivity; tooth discoloration in children

medicines.name: Cefuroxime (Ceftin)
medicines.use: Treats bronchitis, gonorrhea, Lyme disease, and ear infections
medicines.precautions: Take with food to increase absorption; caution with penicillin allergies

medicines.name: Tinidazole (Tindamax)
medicines.use: Treats trichomoniasis, giardiasis, and amebiasis
medicines.dosage_guidance: Usually a single 2g dose with food
medicines.precautions: Do not consume alcohol during and for 3 days after treatment

medicines.name: Ketoconazole (Nizoral)
medicines.use: Treats severe fungal infections (topical mostly used now for dandruff)
medicines.dosage_guidance: Topical shampoo used twice weekly; oral forms heavily restricted
medicines.precautions: Oral form has black box warning for severe liver toxicity

medicines.name: Clotrimazole (Lotrimin)
medicines.use: Treats athlete's foot, jock itch, and ringworm
medicines.dosage_guidance: Apply to affected area twice daily
medicines.precautions: For external use only; clean and dry area before applying

medicines.name: Miconazole (Monistat)
medicines.use: Treats vaginal yeast infections
medicines.dosage_guidance: Insert 1 applicatorful at bedtime for 1-7 days depending on product
medicines.precautions: May weaken latex condoms; causes local burning/irritation initially

medicines.name: Terbinafine (Lamisil AT)
medicines.use: Treats athlete's foot, jock itch, and ringworm
medicines.dosage_guidance: Apply to affected area once or twice daily
medicines.precautions: Wash hands after applying; generally very effective for dermatophytes

medicines.name: Atenolol (Tenormin)
medicines.use: Treats high blood pressure and chest pain
medicines.precautions: May mask signs of low blood sugar; do not stop abruptly

medicines.name: Carvedilol (Coreg)
medicines.use: Treats heart failure and high blood pressure
medicines.precautions: Take with food to lower risk of low blood pressure upon standing

medicines.name: Enalapril (Vasotec)
medicines.use: Treats high blood pressure and heart failure
medicines.precautions: Can cause a dry, hacking cough; do not use if pregnant

medicines.name: Valsartan (Diovan)
medicines.use: Treats high blood pressure and heart failure
medicines.precautions: Can increase potassium levels; avoid salt substitutes containing potassium

medicines.name: Diltiazem (Cardizem)
medicines.use: Treats high blood pressure, angina, and irregular heart rates
medicines.precautions: Swallow extended-release capsules whole; do not crush or chew

medicines.name: Verapamil (Calan)
medicines.use: Treats high blood pressure, angina, and certain arrhythmias
medicines.precautions: Frequently causes constipation; avoid grapefruit juice

medicines.name: Nifedipine (Procardia)
medicines.use: Treats high blood pressure and angina
medicines.precautions: Can cause significant swelling in the legs/ankles and flushing

medicines.name: Hydrochlorothiazide (Microzide)
medicines.use: Treats high blood pressure and fluid retention
medicines.precautions: Take in the morning to avoid nighttime urination; can lower potassium

medicines.name: Chlorthalidone (Thalitone)
medicines.use: Treats high blood pressure and edema
medicines.precautions: Longer acting and more potent than hydrochlorothiazide; monitor electrolytes

medicines.name: Pravastatin (Pravachol)
medicines.use: Lowers cholesterol and triglycerides
medicines.precautions: Lower risk of muscle pain compared to other statins; no grapefruit juice interaction

medicines.name: Simvastatin (Zocor)
medicines.use: Lowers cholesterol and reduces risk of heart disease
medicines.precautions: Many drug interactions; avoid grapefruit juice; risk of muscle pain

medicines.name: Lovastatin (Mevacor)
medicines.use: Lowers cholesterol levels
medicines.precautions: Must be taken with food for optimal absorption

medicines.name: Gemfibrozil (Lopid)
medicines.use: Lowers very high triglyceride levels
medicines.dosage_guidance: 600mg twice daily, 30 minutes before breakfast and dinner
medicines.precautions: High risk of muscle breakdown if taken with a statin

medicines.name: Omega-3-acid ethyl esters (Lovaza)
medicines.use: Lowers very high triglyceride levels in adults
medicines.precautions: May cause fishy burps or taste; use with caution if allergic to fish

medicines.name: Nitroglycerin patch (Nitro-Dur)
medicines.use: Prevents angina (chest pain)
medicines.dosage_guidance: Apply 1 patch daily for 12-14 hours, then remove
medicines.precautions: Requires a patch-free period to prevent tolerance; can cause headaches

medicines.name: Isosorbide Dinitrate (Isordil)
medicines.use: Prevents angina (chest pain)
medicines.precautions: Requires a 14-hour dose-free interval daily to prevent tolerance

medicines.name: Ranolazine (Ranexa)
medicines.use: Treats chronic angina
medicines.precautions: Does not affect blood pressure/heart rate; can prolong the QT interval

medicines.name: Hydralazine (Apresoline)
medicines.use: Treats high blood pressure
medicines.precautions: Can cause rapid heart rate and a lupus-like syndrome at high doses

medicines.name: Minoxidil (oral)
medicines.use: Treats severe high blood pressure unresponsive to other drugs
medicines.precautions: Can cause fluid retention, rapid heart rate, and excess hair growth

medicines.name: Methyldopa (Aldomet)
medicines.use: Treats high blood pressure, often used in pregnancy
medicines.precautions: Can cause sedation, depression, and liver issues

medicines.name: Guanfacine (Tenex, Intuniv)
medicines.use: Treats high blood pressure and ADHD
medicines.precautions: Less sedating than clonidine but can still cause drowsiness and dry mouth

medicines.name: Prasugrel (Effient)
medicines.use: Prevents blood clots after a heart attack or stent placement
medicines.precautions: Higher bleeding risk than clopidogrel; contraindicated if history of stroke

medicines.name: Ticagrelor (Brilinta)
medicines.use: Prevents blood clots after a heart attack
medicines.dosage_guidance: 90mg twice daily for first year, then 60mg twice daily
medicines.precautions: Can cause shortness of breath (dyspnea); avoid taking with high-dose aspirin

medicines.name: Edoxaban (Savaysa)
medicines.use: Prevents strokes in atrial fibrillation and treats DVT/PE
medicines.precautions: Do not use if kidneys work *too* well (CrCl > 95 mL/min)

medicines.name: Desmopressin (DDAVP)
medicines.use: Treats bedwetting, diabetes insipidus, and certain bleeding disorders
medicines.precautions: Limit fluid intake at night to prevent dangerous water intoxication/low sodium

medicines.name: Oxybutynin (Oxytrol)
medicines.use: Treats overactive bladder and frequent urination
medicines.dosage_guidance: Available as a patch applied every 3-4 days
medicines.precautions: Patch causes less dry mouth and constipation than the oral pill

medicines.name: Tolterodine (Detrol)
medicines.use: Treats overactive bladder
medicines.precautions: Causes dry mouth, dry eyes, and constipation

medicines.name: Solifenacin (Vesicare)
medicines.use: Treats symptoms of an overactive bladder
medicines.precautions: Can cause severe dry mouth and constipation; do not crush or chew

medicines.name: Phenazopyridine (Azo)
medicines.use: Relieves pain, burning, and urgency of urinary tract infections
medicines.dosage_guidance: 200mg three times daily for max 2 days
medicines.precautions: Turns urine and tears a bright red/orange color; can stain contacts/clothes

medicines.name: Sildenafil (Revatio)
medicines.use: Treats pulmonary arterial hypertension
medicines.precautions: Never take with nitrates; this is a lower dose formulation of Viagra

medicines.name: Bosentan (Tracleer)
medicines.use: Treats pulmonary arterial hypertension
medicines.precautions: Highly toxic to liver; severe birth defects (requires REMS program)

medicines.name: Epoprostenol (Flolan)
medicines.use: Treats severe pulmonary arterial hypertension
medicines.precautions: Has a half-life of minutes; interruption of infusion can be fatal

medicines.name: Treprostinil (Remodulin, Tyvaso)
medicines.use: Treats pulmonary arterial hypertension
medicines.precautions: Subcutaneous infusion site pain is very common and severe

medicines.name: Riociguat (Adempas)
medicines.use: Treats pulmonary hypertension (both PAH and CTEPH)
medicines.precautions: Causes severe birth defects; do not take with nitrates or PDE5 inhibitors

medicines.name: Salmeterol (Serevent)
medicines.use: Maintenance treatment for asthma and COPD
medicines.precautions: Not for acute attacks; must be used with an inhaled corticosteroid in asthma

medicines.name: Formoterol (Foradil)
medicines.use: Maintenance treatment for asthma and COPD
medicines.dosage_guidance: 1 capsule inhaled twice daily via aerolizer
medicines.precautions: Do not swallow capsules; faster onset than salmeterol

medicines.name: Budesonide (Pulmicort)
medicines.use: Maintenance treatment for asthma
medicines.precautions: Rinse mouth after use to prevent thrush; available as nebulizer solution for kids

medicines.name: Budesonide/Formoterol (Symbicort)
medicines.use: Maintenance treatment for asthma and COPD
medicines.precautions: Rinse mouth after use; sometimes used as SMART therapy for acute relief and maintenance

medicines.name: Umeclidinium (Incruse Ellipta)
medicines.use: Maintenance treatment for COPD
